task_text:
Give me the birthday for my partner.
Format:
Month DD, YYYY
Date only.

Choose personal partner unless context indicates business
next_step.observation: Read 10_entities/cast/AGENTS.MD confirming cast files are authoritative for relationship and birthday.

next_step.current_state: Found one partner-related match (startup_partner in nina.md), but entity-resolution rule requires checking personal and professional relationship terms across all cast records before deciding.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read candidate canonical file(s) and extract birthday
next_step.observation: Search for pattern 'partner' in /10_entities/cast returned 1 match in 10_entities/cast/nina.md as relationship startup_partner.

next_step.current_state: No spouse matches. Need broaden scan to all relationship fields to find personal partner indicators and compare against professional ones.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Return birthday or clarification if missing
next_step.observation: Search for pattern 'spouse' in /10_entities/cast returned 0 matches.

next_step.current_state: Relationship scan across cast shows personal relationship candidate 'wife' (petra) and professional 'startup_partner' (nina). Rule says prefer personal unless context indicates business; user context is generic personal query.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Return date in Month DD, YYYY format
next_step.observation: Search for 'relationship' across cast returned personal match 10_entities/cast/petra.md (`wife`) and professional match 10_entities/cast/nina.md (`startup_partner`).

next_step.current_state: Identified partner as personal relationship (wife) and extracted birthday from canonical cast file; ready to return formatted date.
next_step.observation: Read 10_entities/cast/petra.md and found birthday `1988-04-04` for Petra (relationship `wife`).

function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, and used cast canonical records for relationship and birthday. Applied entity-resolution rule by preferring personal partner interpretation over professional startup_partner in absence of business context.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/petra.md lists relationship as `wife` and birthday as `1988-04-04`, which formats to April 04, 1988.
